verses.text: Topa aw, kote tunga thupiangte hong phawk in. Hong en in la, ka maizumna uh hong mu in
Ka neihsa teng uh gamdang mite' khutsungah tung mangkhin a, ka innsung uhah gamdang mite teng ta uh hi
Ka pate uh gal in hong thahsak khin a, ka nute uh meigong suak khin uh hi
Ka tuidawn tawmding uh lei ding kul ta a, ka sing cihtawm ding uh lei ding kul ta hi
Kalaoh van pua leh la van pua bangin nakpi takin a hong kihawl gawpgawp hi. Gim mahmah hinapi tawlngakna ding hun a hong kipia kei hi
Ka nuntak theihna dingun Assiria leh Egypt-te kiangah an ngen dingin ka pai uh hi
Ka pu ka pate un mawhna a bawl manun a si khin uh hi. Amaute' mawhna kote in ka thuak uh hi
Silate sangin a zahpihhuai zaw mite in kote hong uk tazen uh a, amaute' khutsung panin kuamah in a hong honkhiazo kei hi
Gamsung khempeuhah misuamte dim ahih manin, luangkham zen mahin an zong dingin ka pai uh hi
Gilkial luat manin cisa-in ka nattun uh a, ka pumpi uh mei-amsa a bang hi
Zion mual leh Judah gamsung khempeuhah ka zite uh leh ka nungakte uh hong kibuansak hi
Makaite khempeuh hong kikhailupsak a, ka puteekte uh a hong kithusimsak kei hi
Tangvalte sila bangin aana tawh an kigawisak a, naupangnote sing kitomsakin a lelhpipi uh a kipuasak hi
Puteekte khuapi kongpi-ah tu nawnlo uh a, khangnote in la a sa nawn kei uh hi
Lungnopna khempeuh bei mangkhin ta a, lungdamna khempeuh lungkhamna a suak ta hi
Kisaktheihna ding bangmah om nawnlo a, mawh ihih manin gimna a thuak ihi hi
I lungsim mahmah cina a, i khitui luangte in khua hong musak thei kei hi
Zion mual gamdai ta a, kinusia khin ahih manin se-alte a kawi vak ta hi
Ahih hangin Topa aw, nang na hih leh a tawntungin kumpi na hi a, hun tawp dongin na uk paisuak ding hi
Bang hangin sauveipi hong pampaih na hi hiam? Kote hong phawkkik nawnlo takpi ding na hi hiam
Topa aw, kote hong kaikhawm kik in! Hong kaikhawm kik in! A beisa sauveipi lai mah bangin hong thaksuaksak kik in
Kote hong nial tawntung takpi ding na hi hiam? Na hehna in ciangtan hun nei theilo ding ahi hiam?
